documentation.file_docstring: In-memory storage for files awaiting user consent in the FileConsentCard flow. When sending large files (>=4MB) in personal chats, Teams requires user consent before upload. This module stores the file data temporarily until the user accepts or declines, or until the TTL expires.
inline_comments: Store a file pending user consent. Returns the upload ID to include in the FileConsentCard context.
Retrieve a pending upload by ID. Returns undefined if not found or expired.
Check if expired (in case timeout hasn't fired yet)
Remove a pending upload (after successful upload or user decline).
Get the count of pending uploads (for monitoring/debugging).

functions.name: storePendingUpload
functions.doc: Store a file pending user consent.   Returns the upload ID to include in the FileConsentCard context.

functions.name: getPendingUpload
functions.doc: Retrieve a pending upload by ID.   Returns undefined if not found or expired.

functions.name: removePendingUpload
functions.doc: Remove a pending upload (after successful upload or user decline).

functions.name: getPendingUploadCount
functions.doc: Get the count of pending uploads (for monitoring).
